prompt:
A sleek 1 TB M.2 NVMe SSD resting on an anti-static mat next to a small USB or NVMe enclosure and a laptop in the background. The SSD has a slim rectangular PCB with a simple, abstract label that avoids readable branding, and a subtle “1 TB” capacity suggested by iconography rather than text. A faint glow from the laptop screen hints that the operating system has already been cloned and the drive is ready to boot.

Near-future solarpunk workspace aesthetic with warm lighting, clean wooden surfaces, and a potted plant or tiny solar gadget nearby. Photorealistic 512×512 rendering with no brand logos or legible text on the SSD or enclosure. The composition should emphasize the SSD as a ready-to-use, bootable storage device in the inventory.
